summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of Intercultura language learning platform. All core features working perfectly including authentication, 18 courses from MongoDB, flashcards with audio, quizzes, AI exercises, and user progress tracking. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI excellent with all required features verified.
passed_tests: Home page loads with correct stats (5 idiomas, 54+ lecciones, 180+ flashcards)
Backend API: 18 courses from MongoDB retrieved successfully
Backend API: 180+ flashcards available across all languages
Backend API: User registration and authentication working
Backend API: JWT token generation and validation functional
Backend API: Progress tracking system operational
Backend API: AI exercise generation with GPT-4 working
Backend API: TTS generation with OpenAI integration working
Frontend: Courses page loads all 18 courses correctly
Frontend: Course detail page shows all 4 tabs (Lecciones, Flashcards, Quiz, Ejercicios IA)
Frontend: Flashcards work with flip animation and navigation
Frontend: Quiz interface shows 10 questions with proper start screen
Frontend: AI Exercises tab shows generate button
Frontend: Register page allows user registration with all form fields
Frontend: Login page allows user login with proper validation
Frontend: User registration flow - creates account and redirects to courses
Frontend: User login flow - authenticates and shows user name in navigation
Frontend: After login, progress page accessible with 4 stat cards
Frontend: User logout functionality present and working
Frontend: Language sections for all 5 languages (Spanish, English, French, German, Portuguese)
Frontend: Course navigation and detail page access working
Frontend: Responsive design and mobile navigation working
Integration: Frontend-backend authentication flow seamless
Integration: Course data properly fetched from MongoDB and displayed
Integration: Progress tracking updates correctly after user actions
